recipe.title: Speedy folded flatbread
recipe.description: For those days when you’re after a quick bite to eat, this speedy flatbread hits the spot. You’ll only need one pan, a handful of ingredients and less than 15 minutes.

steps.instructions: Start by prepping your filling. Grate the cheese. Tear the ham. Finely chop the chives. Quarter the cherry tomatoes.

on_enter.say: Start by prepping your filling. Grate the cheese. Tear the ham. Finely chop the chives. Quarter the cherry tomatoes.

steps.instructions: Next, make the flatbread. Put a 24cm non-stick frying pan on a medium heat. Now, simply whisk together the flour, baking powder and yoghurt with a pinch of sea salt and 4 tablespoons of water until smooth.

on_enter.say: Next, make the flatbread. Put a 24cm non-stick frying pan on a medium heat. Now, simply whisk together the flour, baking powder and yoghurt with a pinch of sea salt and 4 tablespoons of water until smooth.

steps.descr: Put a little drizzle of olive oil into the hot pan, then...
steps.instructions: Put a little drizzle of olive oil into the hot pan, then use a spatula to gently and evenly spread the batter across the base of the pan. As it starts to cook, drizzle a little oil around the edge of the pan and, when the top starts to bubble, loosen the edges with a spatula, jiggling the bread in the pan.

on_enter.say: Put a little drizzle of olive oil into the hot pan, then use a spatula to gently and evenly spread the batter across the base of the pan. As it starts to cook, drizzle a little oil around the edge of the pan and, when the top starts to bubble, loosen the edges with a spatula, jiggling the bread in the pan.

steps.descr: Spread or spoon over your topping, add a pinch of black...
steps.instructions: Spread or spoon over your topping, add a pinch of black pepper, then fold one half of the bread over the other. Reduce to a low heat, cook for 2 minutes more on each side, or until beautifully golden, then slide out, let it cool for a minute, slice and enjoy.

on_enter.say: Spread or spoon over your topping, add a pinch of black pepper, then fold one half of the bread over the other. Reduce to a low heat, cook for 2 minutes more on each side, or until beautifully golden, then slide out, let it cool for a minute, slice and enjoy.
